Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Merritt Island

These 13 Merritt Island restaurants pass Florida health inspections with an A grade and earn strong diner ratings — a clean kitchen and a meal people love. Sorted by rating.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →
